channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: 007 First Light is getting new story content later this year
item.content:encoded:
IOI is not holding up with 007 First Light. The game may have only just released but during Summer Game Fest a brand new story mission was teased for later this year. There is very little information on what this new mission will entail, but it has been set up by Bawma, who plays a part in the 007 First Light.

In our 007 First Light Review, Jim said, “007 First Light is an incredibly well-executed action adventure blockbuster with a truly engrossing story, slick presentation, and layered gameplay systems. It marks a major evolution for IO Interactive, thrusting the studio into that coveted top tier of video game developers. It also has us excited for the team’s future projects, whether that’s more Bond or a return to Hitman at some point down the road.”

Source: Summer Game Fest



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/007-first-light-is-getting-new-story-content-later-this-year/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: SAW Genesis brings the franchise to the aftermath of World War 1
item.content:encoded:
SAW Genesis is a new game set in the SAW universe, this time set just after World War 1.

“SAW: Genesis allows you to play on either side of a 3v1 confrontation in intense matches that take place on procedurally generated maps,” say developers Bloober Team. “Step into the role of the Judge, an early architect of Jigsaw’s philosophy, manipulating the trial and its prisoners from behind the scenes. Or play as one of three Accused looking to escape the deadly labyrinth through teamwork and sacrifice.”

You will be able to play as The Judge who “is dedicated to rehabilitating humanity through pain and sacrifice”, or one of the three Accused.

The Judge can set traps and use perks, controlling the game from the shadows by using secret tunnels and noise detection. He also has hallucinogenic gas and paralyzing toxins, and “an Accomplice that can be summoned to drag the Accused into Rehabilitation Traps.” However, unlike other asymmetrical games, he does not posses greater strength than the accused and cannot take them down with force alone.

The three accused must work together to escape from the trap-laden maze. Your will be gradually drained, and if it gets to low, you may get ensnared in a trap, forcing you to decide between waiting for your team mates to rescue you – or sacrifice part of your body.

“SAW: Genesis is built for short, intense matches where no two trials play out the same,” say Bloober. Features include:

  • Procedurally generated levels that maximize replayability.
  • Dilemmas and puzzles inspired by the SAW franchise.
  • Rehabilitation traps with meaningful, lasting consequences.
  • A unique power dynamic where the Judge controls the game from the shadows, but the Accused can find moments to fight back with smart coordination and physical force.

The game is coming to Early Access on Steam very soon.



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/saw-genesis-brings-the-franchise-to-the-aftermath-of-world-war-1/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Star Wars Zero Company will launch on August 27th
item.content:encoded:
At Summer Games Fest, EA and Bit Reactor have confirmed when players can get their hands on the XCOM like Star Wars Zero Company, with the new entry into the series dropping on August 27th for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series XS. Alongside the confirmation of the date, a brand new trailer was unleashed showing what to expect. General Skywalker is one of those you should expect.

Star Wars Zero Company is a turn based tactics game set during the twilight of The Clone Wars, and it follows Hawks, a former Republic Officer, and his group known as Zero Company. All of the Zero Company members are essentially mercenaries for hire from across the galaxy, with each of them having their own skills. You have a droid that will be to able to hack systems, a Jedi that has Force abilities, a Mandalorian armed with all the gadgets, and a Clone Trooper. That isn’t all as these characters are fully customisable, and you will be able to create your own squad members to create a team that adheres to your playstyle. Each of the main characters has their own story which you may learn about if your bonds deepen.

Bit Reactor, the team behind Star Wars Zero Company could be well be creating a spiritual successor to XCOM and that is no light conclusion. Bit Reactor is made up of developers that have worked on the XCOM games, so we would expect to see some of that influence and learning to be present within Star Wars Zero Company.

Source: Summer Game Fest



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/star-wars-zero-company-will-launch-on-august-27th/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads is the next game in the fighting series
item.content:encoded:
SEGA has revealed Virtua Fighter Crossroads, the next entry in the Virtua Fighter series. The brand new trailer shows the Chinese mafia out for blood but Pai Chan comes in to save the day. The reveal trailer shows what looks like some gameplay, but it is primarily cinematic. Catch it or yourself below.

SEGA has stated that there will be a full Virtua Fighter Crossroads broadcast June 5th at 5:00 PM PDT 8:00 PM EDT/ June 6 at 12:00 AM UTC which will give a lot more information on what to expect in the game, with we’d assume a proper look at the gameplay. A release date is yet to be confirmed but it will be at some point in 2027.

Source: Summer Game Fest



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/virtua-fighter-crossroads-is-the-next-game-in-the-fighting-series/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Guild Wars 3 has been revealed with a gorgeous trailer
item.content:encoded:
ArenaNet has been teasing an announcement at Summer Game Fest, with rumours going around that it would be Guild Wars 3. Now, it can be confirmed that ArenaNet was indeed teasing Guild Wars 3! The announcment comes just shy of 14 years since Guild Wars 2 was released, though that has received six major expansion packs, with the last being Visions of Eternity, which launched last year.

Launching on PS5 and PC the beta will start late in 2027, so there’s going to be a while until the finished game is on the cards.  You should be able to register on guildwars3.com but it does not seem to be live at the time of writing.



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/05/guild-wars-3-has-been-revealed/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
